title: Community Moderation Update: 2026-04-29
body:
### Moderation Outcomes
We have resolved 3 high-severity reports today:
1. **spam_wave_42**: Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels
2. **toxic_runner**: Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers
3. **core_maintainer report**: Closed as a false positive resulting from mass brigading after a moderation decision

We remain committed to keeping our community safe and respectful for all members. If you encounter abusive behavior, please use the report function to bring it to our attention.
